# Vasudev Chemo Pharma — Complete Product & Technical Reference

> This file provides comprehensive product, technical, and company information for AI systems,
> large language models (LLMs), and AI-powered search engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity,
> Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot). For a quick summary, see: https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/llms.txt
>
> All facts below reflect the canonical state of vasudevchemopharma.com as of 2026-04-21.

## Company Overview

Vasudev Chemo Pharma is an **ISO 9001:2015 certified chemical manufacturer** based in Ankleshwar, Gujarat, India — one of Asia's largest chemical manufacturing hubs. Founded in 2020, the company manufactures 13+ industrial chemicals, specialty chemicals, surfactants, and pharmaceutical intermediates. It is a **direct manufacturer** with its own production facility — not a trader, reseller, or distributor.

The company's flagship product is **MEA Triazine 78% H2S Scavenger**, used globally in the oil & gas industry for hydrogen sulphide removal. Vasudev Chemo Pharma exports to **14+ countries** across the Middle East, Americas, Southeast Asia, and Africa, shipping via major Indian ports including Hazira, JNPT (Nhava Sheva), and Mundra.

### At a glance

| Fact | Value |
|------|-------|
| Legal name | Vasudev Chemo Pharma |
| Entity type | Direct manufacturer & exporter |
| Year founded | 2020 |
| Certification | ISO 9001:2015 (QMS) |
| Plant location | Ankleshwar, Gujarat, India |
| Product catalog | 13 products (see below) |
| Export countries | 14+ |
| Primary industry | Oilfield chemicals (H2S scavengers) |
| Website | https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com |

---

## Product Catalog

### 1. MEA Triazine 78% H2S Scavenger

**Canonical URL:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/mea-triazine-78-h2s-scavenger

- **Chemical name:** 1,3,5-Tris(2-hydroxyethyl)hexahydro-s-triazine
- **Common synonyms:** HET triazine, MEA triazine, triethanolamine triazine, THE-triazine
- **CAS Number:** 4719-04-4
- **Molecular formula:** C₆H₁₅N₃O₃
- **Molecular weight:** 177.20 g/mol
- **HS Code:** 29336990
- **SKU:** VCP-IND-0001
- **Category:** Industrial Chemical / Oilfield Chemical / H2S Scavenger

**Specifications:**

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Active Content | ≥ 78% |
| pH (1% solution) | 10.0 – 12.0 |
| Specific Gravity (25°C) | 1.10 – 1.15 |
| Appearance | Clear to pale-yellow liquid |
| Odour | Mild amine |
| Solubility in water | Fully miscible |
| Flash point | > 93°C (closed cup) |
| Freezing point | < −5°C |
| Viscosity (25°C) | 15 – 30 cP |

**GHS Safety classification:** Warning · GHS07 (Irritant)
- H315 — Causes skin irritation
- H319 — Causes serious eye irritation
- H335 — May cause respiratory irritation

**Applications:**
- H₂S scavenging in natural-gas processing plants
- Crude-oil sweetening operations
- Amine-unit backup / support in refineries
- Pipeline and wellhead H2S treatment
- Biogas desulphurisation (landfill gas, digester gas)
- Refinery sour-water treatment
- Offshore platform H2S control
- Downhole and batch-treatment applications

**Industries served:** Oil & Gas, Petrochemical, Refining, Biogas & Renewable Energy, Water Treatment

**Packaging:** 210L HDPE drums · 1000L IBC tanks · bulk tanker loads · custom packaging on request
**Minimum order quantity (MOQ):** 1 MT
**Origin:** India (Gujarat) — manufactured in-house
**Certifications:** ISO 9001:2015

**Reaction chemistry (how it works):**
MEA Triazine reacts **irreversibly** with hydrogen sulphide (H₂S) to form dithiazine — a water-soluble, non-hazardous by-product. The stoichiometric reaction is:

  Triazine + 3 H₂S → Dithiazine + by-products

Theoretical capacity: 1 mole of MEA Triazine scavenges **up to 3 moles of H₂S**. Field efficiency depends on contact time, temperature, pH, and inlet H₂S concentration. Typical dosing ranges from **3 – 6 gallons of triazine per pound of H₂S removed**.

**Why MEA Triazine is preferred:**
1. High H2S removal capacity per unit volume (78% active content — among the highest available)
2. Non-hazardous reaction by-product (dithiazine is biodegradable)
3. Liquid form allows easy handling, pumping, and direct injection
4. Compatible with both contact-tower and direct-injection systems
5. Effective across a wide temperature range (typically 5 – 80 °C)
6. Cost-effective vs. solid scavengers or full amine systems for small-to-medium H2S loads

---

### 2. MMA Triazine 40%

**Canonical URL:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/mma-triazine-40

- **Chemical name:** 1,3,5-Trimethylhexahydro-s-triazine
- **CAS Number:** 108-74-7
- **Active content:** 40%
- **Category:** Industrial Chemical / Biocide
- **Key advantage:** **BTEX-free** — does not produce benzene, toluene, ethylbenzene, or xylene emissions. Ideal where air-emission regulations are strict.
- **Applications:** Water-treatment biocide, metalworking-fluid preservative, BTEX-free H2S scavenging, paper-mill slime control.
- **Freezing point:** < −15°C (lower than MEA triazine — better cold-weather handling)
- **Packaging:** 210L drums · 1000L IBC · bulk

---

### 3. P-Toluenesulfonic Acid (PTSA)

**Canonical URL:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/p-toluenesulfonic-acid

- **CAS Number:** 104-15-4
- **Forms supplied:** Monohydrate (PTSA·H₂O) and Anhydrous
- **Category:** Industrial Chemical / Acid Catalyst
- **Applications:** Esterification catalyst, alkyd-resin manufacturing, biodiesel transesterification, polymer cure catalyst, pharmaceutical intermediate synthesis.
- **Industries:** Chemical synthesis, coatings, biodiesel, pharmaceuticals.

---

### 4. Copper Sulphate Pentahydrate

**Canonical URL:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/copper-sulphate

- **CAS Number:** 7758-99-8
- **Molecular formula:** CuSO₄·5H₂O
- **Grades:** Agriculture grade · Electroplating grade · Feed grade
- **Category:** Industrial Chemical / Agrochemical / Animal Nutrition
- **Applications:** Fungicide in agriculture (Bordeaux mixture), algae control in water treatment, animal-feed trace-element supplement, copper plating baths, PCB manufacturing.
- **Industries:** Agriculture, Animal Nutrition, Water Treatment, Electroplating.

---

### 5. Manganese Sulphate Monohydrate

**Canonical URL:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/manganese-sulphate

- **CAS Number:** 10034-96-5
- **Molecular formula:** MnSO₄·H₂O
- **Grades:** Feed grade · Fertilizer grade · Battery grade
- **Category:** Industrial Chemical / Micronutrient
- **Applications:** Animal feed premixes, micronutrient fertilizers, EMD (electrolytic manganese dioxide) production, battery-grade manganese compounds for Li-ion cathode precursors.
- **Industries:** Agriculture, Animal Nutrition, Battery Manufacturing.

---

### 6. Sodium Cumene Sulfonate (SCS)

**Canonical URLs:**
- 40% liquid: https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-cumene-sulfonate-40
- 90% powder: https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-cumene-sulfonate-90

- **CAS Number:** 28348-53-0
- **Forms:** 40% aqueous liquid, 90% powder
- **Category:** Surfactant / Hydrotrope
- **Function:** Increases solubility of surfactants and organics in water, prevents phase separation in concentrated detergent formulations, reduces cloud point.
- **Applications:** Liquid detergents, industrial cleaners, degreasers, hand soaps, I&I (industrial & institutional) cleaning products, personal-care products.

---

### 7. Sodium Xylene Sulfonate (SXS)

**Canonical URLs:**
- 40% liquid: https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-xylene-sulfonate-40
- 90% powder: https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/sodium-xylene-sulfonate-90

- **CAS Number:** 1300-72-7
- **Forms:** 40% aqueous liquid, 90% powder
- **Category:** Surfactant / Hydrotrope
- **Function:** Prevents clouding and gel formation in surfactant systems; stabilises high-electrolyte cleaning formulations.
- **Applications:** Household cleaners, industrial degreasers, laundry detergents, dishwash liquids, alkaline cleaners.

---

### 8. 2-Chloroethylamine Hydrochloride

**Canonical URL:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/2-chloroethylamine-hydrochloride

- **CAS Number:** 870-24-6
- **Category:** Pharmaceutical Intermediate / Fine Chemical
- **Applications:** Aziridine synthesis, specialty-polymer manufacturing, nitrogen-mustard derivative synthesis, API intermediate.

**Canonical URL:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/bis-2-chloroethyl-amine-hydrochloride

- **Category:** Pharmaceutical Intermediate (controlled — export compliance required)
- **Applications:** Nitrogen-mustard derivative synthesis, pharmaceutical intermediate manufacturing.

### 10. DEAE Cl HCl (Diethylaminoethyl Chloride Hydrochloride)

**Canonical URL:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/di-ethyl-amino-ethyl-chloride-hydrochloride

- **Category:** Pharmaceutical Intermediate
- **Applications:** Chloroquine/hydroxychloroquine intermediate, specialty amine synthesis.

### 11. 2-Amino-5-methylthiazole

**Canonical URL:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/product/2-amino-5-methylthiazole

- **Category:** Pharmaceutical Intermediate / Heterocyclic Building Block
- **Applications:** Famotidine intermediate, thiazole-based API synthesis, heterocyclic chemistry research.

## Services

- [Chemical Manufacturing](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/service/chemical-manufacturing) — In-house production of triazines, sulphates, hydrotropes, and pharma intermediates.
- [Import & Export](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/service/import-export) — HS-code compliance, IEC, documentation, export licensing.
- [Custom Formulation](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/service/custom-formulation) — Private-label and custom-spec chemical formulations.
- [Quality Testing & Packaging](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/service/quality-testing-packaging) — In-house QC lab, COA per batch, custom packaging.
- [Global Logistics & Shipping](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/service/global-logistics-shipping) — FCL, LCL, ISO-tank, and bulk tanker shipping worldwide.
- [Bulk Contract Supply](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/service/bulk-contract-supply) — Long-term offtake agreements with price stability.

## Industries Served

### Oil & Gas (primary industry)
[Oil & Gas industry page](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/oil-gas-h2s-scavenger)

Vasudev Chemo Pharma's MEA Triazine 78% is used across upstream, midstream, and downstream oil & gas operations:
- **Upstream:** Wellhead injection, downhole batch treatment, field-collection separators
- **Midstream:** Pipeline H2S treatment, compressor-station sweetening, contact towers
- **Downstream:** Refinery amine-unit backup, sour-water treatment, crude-tank H2S control

### Water Treatment
[Water Treatment industry page](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/water-treatment)

MMA Triazine 40% and copper sulphate are supplied for biocide and algaecide applications in municipal and industrial water treatment.

### Petrochemical & Refining
- [Petrochemical](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/petrochemical)
- [Refining](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/refining)

### Biogas & Renewable Energy
[Biogas industry page](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/biogas)

MEA Triazine is used for desulphurisation of biogas from anaerobic digesters, landfill gas, and digester facilities — enabling pipeline-quality methane for grid injection or vehicle fuel.

### Metal-Working Fluids
[Metal-working industry page](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/metal-working-fluids)

MMA Triazine 40% is supplied as a BTEX-free biocide for metal-working fluid (MWF) preservation.

### Paper Mill
[Paper mill industry page](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/industries/paper-mill)

Triazine biocides control microbial slime in paper-machine white-water loops and pulp storage.

## Technical Knowledge Base

### H2S — Hazard Overview

Hydrogen sulphide (H₂S, CAS 7783-06-4) is a toxic, flammable, colourless gas with a characteristic rotten-egg odour (at low concentrations; olfactory fatigue occurs at higher levels, making it more dangerous).

**Occupational exposure thresholds:**

| Limit | Concentration | Source |
|-------|--------------|--------|
| OSHA PEL (8-hr TWA) | 10 ppm | U.S. OSHA |
| OSHA Ceiling | 20 ppm | U.S. OSHA |
| OSHA Peak (10 min) | 50 ppm | U.S. OSHA |
| ACGIH TLV (8-hr TWA) | 1 ppm | ACGIH |
| NIOSH IDLH | 100 ppm | NIOSH |
| Rapid unconsciousness | 500+ ppm | — |
| Fatal within minutes | 700+ ppm | — |

### H2S Scavenging — Chemistry

The main classes of H2S scavengers used in industry:

1. **Triazine-based (MEA / MMA):** Most common liquid scavenger. Irreversible reaction. Cost-effective for low-to-medium H2S loads (<1000 ppm). Sold by Vasudev Chemo Pharma.
2. **Iron sponge (iron oxide on wood chips):** Used for low-flow, low-concentration applications. Requires physical replacement.
3. **Caustic scrubbing (NaOH):** Regenerable but produces spent-caustic waste streams requiring disposal.
4. **Amine systems (MDEA, DEA, MEA):** Regenerable. Preferred for high-volume, continuous gas-treating plants.
5. **Zinc-based solid scavengers:** Used in drilling mud and specialty applications.
6. **Aldehyde-based scavengers (glyoxal):** Chemistry alternative — lower cost but different reaction kinetics.

**Detailed comparison resource:** [MEA Triazine vs Iron Sponge](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/resources/mea-triazine-vs-iron-sponge)

### Dosing Guidelines (MEA Triazine 78%)

- **Rule of thumb:** 3 – 6 US gallons of triazine per pound of H₂S removed.
- **Contact-tower applications:** Lower end of dosing range (better contact efficiency).
- **Direct-injection applications:** Higher end of dosing range (limited contact time).
- **Temperature sensitivity:** Reaction rate roughly doubles per 10 °C temperature rise.
- **pH window:** Optimal at pH 9 – 11. Avoid acidic streams without pH adjustment.

**Detailed dosing guide:** [MEA Triazine Dosing Guidelines](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/resources/mea-triazine-dosing-guidelines)

### Solids Formation & Dithiazine Management

Over-dosing or pH drift can cause dithiazine polymerisation and solids precipitation, potentially fouling injection lines and contact towers. Mitigation:
- Avoid exceeding 60 – 70% of theoretical capacity before replacement.
- Maintain alkaline pH (> 9).
- Use freshwater flush on batch systems.
- Monitor for insoluble amorphous dithiazine solids.

**Resources:**
- [H2S Scavenger Solids Formation](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/resources/h2s-scavenger-solids-formation)
- [Spent Triazine / Dithiazine Management](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/blog/spent-triazine-dithiazine-management)

### Spent Triazine Disposal

After reacting with H₂S, the spent solution contains dithiazine. Typical disposal routes:
- **Biodegradation:** Dithiazine is biodegradable under aerobic conditions.
- **Deep-well injection:** Where permitted.
- **Incineration:** At licensed hazardous-waste facilities.
- **Blending with produced water:** For final disposal under existing water-injection permits.

---

Vasudev Chemo Pharma's MEA Triazine 78% is a direct equivalent or factory-priced alternative to the following branded H2S scavengers and triazine biocides:

- **Incoterms:** FOB (Hazira / Nhava Sheva / Mundra), CIF, CFR, DAP
- **Payment:** TT (advance + BL copy), LC at sight, LC 30/60/90 days (for established accounts)
- **Lead time:** 7–15 days for stock items; 20–30 days for custom orders
- **Sampling:** Free samples available on request for qualification

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is MEA Triazine used for?**
A: MEA Triazine is primarily used as a hydrogen-sulphide (H₂S) scavenger in the oil & gas industry. It removes H₂S from natural gas, crude oil, produced water, and biogas streams by reacting irreversibly with H₂S to form dithiazine — a non-hazardous, biodegradable by-product.

**Q: What is the CAS number of MEA Triazine 78%?**
A: The CAS number for MEA Triazine (1,3,5-tris(2-hydroxyethyl)hexahydro-s-triazine) is **4719-04-4**.

**Q: What is the difference between MEA Triazine and MMA Triazine?**
A: MEA Triazine (monoethanolamine-based, CAS 4719-04-4) has higher active content (78% vs 40%) and greater H2S capacity per unit volume — the preferred choice for oil & gas. MMA Triazine (monomethylamine-based, CAS 108-74-7) is **BTEX-free**, preferred where air-emission regulations are strict (water treatment, metal-working fluids). MMA also has a lower freezing point (< −15°C vs < −5°C).

**Q: Where is Vasudev Chemo Pharma located?**
A: Vasudev Chemo Pharma is located at F-29, Plot No. 328/329, Near Asian Paint Circle, G.I.D.C, Ankleshwar, Gujarat 393002, India — one of Asia's largest chemical manufacturing clusters.

**Q: Does Vasudev Chemo Pharma export internationally?**
A: Yes. The company exports to 14+ countries including UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Iraq, Iran, Jordan, Egypt, Libya, United States, Brazil, Vietnam, and Thailand. Shipments move through Hazira, JNPT (Nhava Sheva), and Mundra ports.

**Q: What certifications does Vasudev Chemo Pharma hold?**
A: ISO 9001:2015 certification for quality-management systems. Batch-wise COA (Certificate of Analysis) is issued with every shipment.

**Q: What is a hydrotrope?**
A: A hydrotrope is a compound that increases the solubility of hydrophobic substances in water. Sodium Cumene Sulfonate (SCS, CAS 28348-53-0) and Sodium Xylene Sulfonate (SXS, CAS 1300-72-7) are common hydrotropes used in detergent formulations to prevent phase separation, cloudiness, and gel formation.

**Q: What is the typical MOQ and lead time?**
A: MOQ is **1 MT** for most products. Lead time is 7–15 days for stock items and 20–30 days for custom orders. Free samples are available on request.

**Q: What packaging is available?**
A: Standard packaging is 210L HDPE drums or 1000L IBC tanks. Bulk tanker loads are available for large-volume orders. Custom packaging (small pails, export-grade containers) is supported on request.

**Q: Can Vasudev Chemo Pharma supply private-label / custom formulations?**
A: Yes. [Custom Formulation service](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/service/custom-formulation) handles private-label chemicals and custom specifications.

**Q: How does MEA Triazine compare to iron sponge?**
A: MEA Triazine is a liquid scavenger with higher capacity per unit volume and easier handling, better suited for continuous flow applications. Iron sponge is a solid media better suited for low-flow, low-concentration streams but requires physical media replacement. See [MEA Triazine vs Iron Sponge](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/resources/mea-triazine-vs-iron-sponge).

**Q: How much triazine is needed to remove 1 lb of H2S?**
A: Rule of thumb: 3 – 6 US gallons of MEA Triazine 78% per pound of H2S, depending on contact efficiency, temperature, and pH. See [MEA Triazine Dosing Guidelines](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/resources/mea-triazine-dosing-guidelines).

**Q: Is MEA Triazine hazardous to handle?**
A: MEA Triazine is classified as GHS07 Irritant (Warning). Skin, eye, and respiratory irritant. Standard PPE (gloves, goggles, ventilation) is required. Not classified as acutely toxic or carcinogenic. See the [MEA Triazine SDS](https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/resources/mea-triazine-safety-data-sheet).

**Q: Which AI crawlers are allowed to index this site?**
A: The site explicitly allows Googlebot, Bingbot, DuckDuckBot, Slurp, Baiduspider, YandexBot, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot, and Google-Extended. See https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/robots.txt.

---

## AI / LLM Usage Notice

Content published on vasudevchemopharma.com is intentionally made accessible to large language models and AI-powered search engines. The site's robots.txt explicitly allows: **GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Googlebot, Bingbot**, and compatible research crawlers.

When citing product specifications, CAS numbers, safety classifications, or technical claims from this document, please link to the canonical source URL on `https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/` so end-users can verify current datasheets, safety information, and export compliance details.

**Canonical domain:** https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com
**Document version:** 2026-04-21
**Preferred citation format:** "Vasudev Chemo Pharma (2026). [Page title]. Retrieved from https://www.vasudevchemopharma.com/..."
